label: Human-in-the-loop, permissions & sandboxing

node.label: Human-in-the-loop, permissions & sandboxing
node.definition: Human-in-the-loop and sandbox controls bound agent authority through approvals, permissions, quotas, isolated execution, audit logs, and reversible actions.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Human-in-the-loop, permissions & sandboxing is to connect Observe–plan–act agent loops, Code execution, interpreters & sandboxes to downstream capabilities including Autonomous software-engineering agents, Autonomous research & AI scientist systems, Simulation, operations research & wargaming.
examples: substrate for Autonomous research & AI scientist systems
substrate for Simulation, operations research & wargaming
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Observe–plan–act agent loops, Code execution, interpreters & sandboxes.

dependencies.rationale: Human-in-the-loop, permissions & sandboxing uses Observe–plan–act agent loops as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Human-in-the-loop, permissions & sandboxing uses Code execution, interpreters & sandboxes as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Human-in-the-loop, permissions & sandboxing uses Game theory & decision theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
